item.title: My sweet ex-husband is dying tomorrow
item.description:
This is Shawn. Shawn and I were married from 2014-2020. He was an amazing father to our daughter, and an even more amazing Papa Bear to my two older daughters.
Shawn was so kind. He was the kindest, most gentle, most generous man I had ever met. I had to marry him.
I loved doing life with him, but ultimately we were better together as friends than as spouses. He LOVED being a father.
On January 30 he had a major stroke and went to the hospital. Overnight he had a second major stroke that put him in a coma. The neurologist was not sure if or when he would come to, but let us know his life on the other side of this coma was extremely poor quality. He would be blind, have paralysis in his limbs, may not know who we are, would need a feeding tube, and be kept in a nursing home indefinitely. His mother made the hard choice to bring hospice in after he spent 2 weeks in a coma.
I want to remember him as the father he was. He was so loving and so proud of his daughters. He loved his family and friends with all his heart. I'm so proud to have known him and shared 8 years of my life with him. I love you, Shawn Paul.
item.dc:creator: chickensareawesome

item.title: Train Jane
item.description:
Radio presenter Greg James made a new friend on the train today
Best buds!
item.dc:creator: mynameisnotphoebe

item.title: "Stuck in the Back"
item.description: I did not write these tweets, but according to the twitter bio of the guy who did, he "Was not stuck in a hotel" and "wrote the story for fun". I don't mind, though. It elicited a genuine anxiety response in me. Especially photos of the dark hallways and the single stack of chairs.
item.dc:creator: tehpipe

item.title: PSA about potential vaccine side effects, please pay attention people, this is for real. Happened to me too.
item.dc:creator: michaelv2

item.title: I'm still buzzed from the halftime show! WEST SIDE!
item.description:
I'm 38, and my 10yr old son definitely enjoyed watching his mom and dad jamming tf out
Just GOAT things
Hip Hop royalty
Accurate.
So everybody, just follow me! Cause we need a little controversy, cause it feels so empty WITHOUT ME
No hate on 50, a little lighthearted jokes but it's all in good fun. Full disclosure, I weigh 45lbs more than I did 10yrs ago
Snoop can pull off anything lol
For real tho, god DAMN Mary J!
item.dc:creator: CrazyDreams

item.title: Day 261: of cheeseburgers I want inside of me
item.description: Oklahoma John Double Smash Patties, Fried Onion, Single American Cheese, Deep Fried Jalapenos, Maple Bacon, In-house Chili Sauce On A Potato Bun From John Belvedere In Parramatta NSW, Australia Previous Day 260: https://imgur.com/gallery/8z2f7p8 MESSAGE ME BURGER PICS OR YOUR FAVORITE BURGER SPOTS! Map of all burger spots that are available on yelp! Big thanks to @OhBoyDoIHaveNews4U for this. Link to his post and map https://imgur.com/gallery/vcObDuD

item.title: Parenting and mental health photo dump
item.description:
1. #mindful_parenting
2. #theoggentleparent
3. I originally heard this said on the show Louie
4. #empathy
5. ❤️
6. #anxiety
7. Love this
8. #control
9. A good reminder
10. Raising strong daughters
11. Makes sense
12. ?
13. My bonus daughter would totally do something like this ?
14. But really though
15. ??‍♀️
16. ??‍♀️
17. On days that seem extra tough I try to remember this
18. ?
19. Haha fork knife #fortnite
20. The wooorrrsssttt
21. ?
22. ??????
23. The struggle is real when you have ADHD and are trying so hard to actively listen to your very excited kiddo’s never ending story #adhd
24. My bonus son loves to collect things
25. ?
26. Had this happen last year
27. My husband and I are so fortunate to have this type of relationship with his ex and her husband! Successful co-parenting
28. Ope
29. I like these
30. Haha yep
31. ❤️
32. ☀️
33. Daily reminder
34. ?
35. We’re all assholes sometimes and it’s okay to recognize that
36. ?
37. Happened more than once for sure
38.
39. Some days I do a better job at this than others ❤️
40. #mental_health
41. ?
42. Mr. Rogers was so great!
43. ❤️
44. ?
45. Love this so much
46. ??‍♀️
47. ?
48. The only way that we are on time to school every day is by getting there 20 minutes early ?
49. ?

item.title: 59 year old Ukrainian grandmother receiving combat training in preparation for Russian invasion
item.description:
Source: https://www.mirror.co.uk/news/world-news/gran-59-trains-army-ukraine-26149027
Civilian volunteers train for war with dummy guns near Kiev.
Volunteers training with Ukraine's Territorial Defence Forces include Yuri, a 12 year old boy.
item.dc:creator: PrincePiggo

item.title: I don't have a girlfriend so here's my 1973 pocket calculator (featuring 1000FPS slomo)
item.description:
Texas Instruments Datamath. Effectively the first pocket calculator.
50 year old peelies
Pi² at 1000fps on the nixie tube LED screen. What you are watching is the logic actually flowing through logic gates until it flows through them all and settles on the answer.
Pi² at real time speed. I used to think calculators had a chip that stored all the answers on it so I used to try to come up with math questions I didn't think they would expect.
Valentine's Day tax
item.dc:creator: BaklavaWearingBalaclavaWhilePlayingBalalaikaOnBlackLava
